description:
Implement a code change while respecting all behavioral specs. Checks existing specs before implementation, verifies no violations after, and registers affected files in _registry.json. Used standalone via /run-workflow, /code-with-spec, or via delegate_to from spec-write-and-implement.

Two modes:
- WITH component: targets a specific component's spec (original behavior)
- WITHOUT component: analyzes the instruction to auto-discover affected specs via _registry.json (broad mode)

params.instruction: add max length validation with character counter

param_defs.name: component
param_defs.description: Component name to implement changes for (e.g., EditField). If not provided, the workflow auto-discovers affected specs by analyzing the instruction text and checking _registry.json.

param_defs.name: domain
param_defs.description: Logical domain (e.g., ui, messaging). Used to find the spec file.

param_defs.name: instruction
param_defs.description: What code change to make. Required when component is not provided. If called from spec-write-and-implement, this is derived from the spec requirements.

param_defs.name: spec_path
param_defs.description: Explicit path to the spec file. If not provided, searches .agent/specs/**/{component}.md.

steps.name: check-specs
steps.goal: Find the primary spec for {component} in .agent/specs/{domain}/. Read _registry.json to identify all files that implement this spec (direct, imports, style, config, test). Read the spec file and extract all requirements. Identify related specs that may be affected. Write a spec-context.json with: spec path, requirements list, affected files, related specs.
steps.summary: Found primary spec ui/EditField.md with 8 requirements. Related specs: ui/FormLayout.md (imports relationship). Affected files: src/components/EditField.tsx, src/validation/fieldRules.ts.

steps.name: implement
steps.goal: Implement the requested change: {instruction}. Modify the component {component} and any related files. Follow all requirements from the spec. Write an implementation-report.json documenting what was changed and why.
steps.summary: Added maxLength prop with character counter display. Updated validation rules in fieldRules.ts. Added CSS styles for counter and error states. Gate retry: forgot to write implementation-report.json on first attempt.

steps.name: verify
steps.goal: Verify that all modified files comply with their specs. Read the implementation report, then check each modified file against the relevant spec requirements. Write a verification-report.json with pass/fail per requirement.
steps.summary: Verified 3 modified files against 2 specs (EditField, FormLayout). All 8 primary requirements satisfied. No violations found in related specs.

steps.name: register
steps.goal: Update _registry.json to reflect the current implementation mapping. Add any new files that now implement the spec. Update last_verified date.
steps.summary: Updated _registry.json: EditField mapping now includes 3 files (direct: EditField.tsx, imports: fieldRules.ts, style: EditField.module.css). Last verified: 2026-03-14.
